KraneShares Man Buyout Beta Index ETF (BUYO) Lists on NYSE: Applying Private Equity Selection Criteria To Public Equities

holdings.infoBox: BUYO is an equity ETF with a total of 299 individual holdings. The top holdings are DigitalOcean Holdings stock at 1.96%, Onto Innovation at 1.54%, Jabil at 1.50%, Coherent at 1.41%, and News Corporation at 1.37%.

overview.description: The KraneShares Man Buyout Beta Index ETF (BUYO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Man Buyout Beta index, a market-cap-weighted index designed to deliver private-equity-like performance through investments in small- and mid-cap US stocks BUYO was launched on Oct 8, 2024 and is issued by KraneShares.

data.title: Here's how bond ETFs fared as investors parsed new inflation, jobless-claims data
data.text: This week's ETF Wrap shines the light on bond-fund performance as investors on Thursday weighed fresh inflation and jobless-claims data.
